body_txt: Unproblematic Prostitution ? Not when this person is around. This person will have no qualms about physically abusing their workers — at best it's a Bitch Slap , at worst it's full-on murder . They have to keep their workers in line, understand? They'll often have a Predatory Prostitute by their side to help maintain order, resulting in a lot of Broken Birds who are pushed well past the Despair Event Horizon and worse . Some of these workers may fall victim to substance abuse — one that was inflicted on them . They'll use Sexual Extortion if they're feeling "generous" towards a worker who did something wrong (e.g., not giving enough of a cut, the worker tried to run away). They'll invoke Revenge Porn Blackmail towards johns who don't pay, especially if they're people of importance. And human trafficking ? They're all for it. Anything for more money rolling in . They'll have no regrets about having underage workers (worst still if they're their own children ) so long as they're getting paid to provide them. It's this detail that has others thoroughly terrified of them — if they're willing to go that far, what else are they capable of ? The worst of the Predatory Pimps will combine the three special kinds of evil: rape , slavery , and pedophilia . And when their Karma Houdini Warranty finally runs out (usually either a case of The Dog Bites Back or the pimp pissing off somebody more dangerous than they are ), don't expect anyone to miss them . The Predatory Pimp comes in two flavors: the Pimp (men) and the Madam (women).  A Sub-Trope of Mean Boss and The Dreaded . Contrast Miss Kitty , who actually cares about her workers. As this is a sex-related trope, No Real Life Examples, Please!
